trackers.name: mystery_meat
trackers.description: tracks how many times player has eaten sonja's meal prep

flags.name: mystery_meat_bangs
flags.description: player selects "yes" when asked if sonja's meal prep is good

flags.name: mystery_meat_sucks
flags.description: player selects "no" when asked if sonja's meal prep is good

node-start.title: The Dream [A]
node-start.description:
Luka has recurring dream about surreal space.
(SCENE) Completely white for a few seconds before text box appears at the bottom of the screen.
node-start.speaker: Narrator

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Light shines down upon me, as if this plane has placed me center stage in a spotlight.
dialogueLines.formattedText: Light shines down upon me, as if this plane has placed me center stage in a spotlight.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: At first, the light was disorienting, alien, but how many times have I walked down this path now?
dialogueLines.formattedText: At first, the light was disorienting, alien, but how many times have I walked down this path now?

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: I play a game with myself when I arrive, trying to make connections to visits prior; I never find any.
dialogueLines.formattedText: I play a game with myself when I arrive, trying to make connections to visits prior; I never find any.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Despite the absurdity of this place, I find myself growing used to it.
dialogueLines.formattedText: Despite the absurdity of this place, I find myself growing used to it.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: What was once unknown to me, unsettling… it's become oddly comforting in it's unfamiliarity.
dialogueLines.formattedText: What was once unknown to me, unsettling… it's become oddly comforting in it's unfamiliarity.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Does this journey always start in the same place?
dialogueLines.formattedText: Does this journey always start in the same place?

choices.text: Sometimes the sun is not as bright.
Sometimes there's a distant cry. A cat? A crow?

9dd6fc19-bb96-47b0-ad0b-3f8d82f099d1.title: The Dream [B]
9dd6fc19-bb96-47b0-ad0b-3f8d82f099d1.description:
(SCENE) Dots of colour appear, floating around the screen. 
Changes to weird amalgamation of plants; a "garden" but not in the traditional sense.
Once again changes to "rose" bush (glitch/abberation effects?) sitting standalone in the light.
9dd6fc19-bb96-47b0-ad0b-3f8d82f099d1.speaker: Narrator

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Even without seeing them, I know something is there, but I never know what, exactly.
dialogueLines.formattedText: Even without seeing them, I know something is there, but I never know what, exactly.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: There is one persistence, however. One stable variable in this sea of unquantifiable light.
dialogueLines.formattedText: There is one persistence, however. One stable variable in this sea of unquantifiable light.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: A garden.
dialogueLines.formattedText: A garden.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: It looks nothing like the flora near town, or anything I've seen, really. It never looks the same, but somehow I always know that it is what it is.
dialogueLines.formattedText: It looks nothing like the flora near town, or anything I've seen, really. It never looks the same, but somehow I always know that it is what it is.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: It is the same, yet not.
dialogueLines.formattedText: It is the same, yet not.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: The surreality is somehow refreshing.
dialogueLines.formattedText: The surreality is somehow refreshing.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Against my will, an unknown force urges me forward into the neverending brightness.
dialogueLines.formattedText: Against my will, an unknown force urges me forward into the neverending brightness.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: The unknown begins to make itself knowable, and what was one abstract forms into familiar shapes.
dialogueLines.formattedText: The unknown begins to make itself knowable, and what was one abstract forms into familiar shapes.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: The light, always everywhere and nowhere at once is now before me. I don't need to squint to see what it has become.
dialogueLines.formattedText: The light, always everywhere and nowhere at once is now before me. I don't need to squint to see what it has become.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: This time, without the help of the unseen, I move my hand forward for what feels like an eternity. As the tips of my fingers inch ever closer to the strange flower, I become more aware of myself; inch by inch, my body grows heavy, as if I am not meant to pluck the rose from it's sanctuary.
dialogueLines.formattedText: This time, without the help of the unseen, I move my hand forward for what feels like an eternity. As the tips of my fingers inch ever closer to the strange flower, I become more aware of myself; inch by inch, my body grows heavy, as if I am not meant to pluck the rose from it's sanctuary.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Against the screaming unheard but heard that seems to be begging me to stop, all I can think is that I want to take this bloom. I want to give it to xxxxxx.
dialogueLines.formattedText: Against the screaming unheard but heard that seems to be begging me to stop, all I can think is that I want to take this bloom. I want to give it to xxxxxx.

56fb7946-1ba4-422e-bfff-0eebc3126a65.title: The Dream [C]
56fb7946-1ba4-422e-bfff-0eebc3126a65.description: (SCENE) Something shoots out from behind Luka and snatches the flower (animated); screen flashes white, then black.
56fb7946-1ba4-422e-bfff-0eebc3126a65.speaker: Narrator

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: I hadn't noticed the break in the relentless light; the swift shadow overhead, as what I could only understand to be an arm, or some kind of... appendage, shoot past my head and into the bush.
dialogueLines.formattedText: I hadn't noticed the break in the relentless light; the swift shadow overhead, as what I could only understand to be an arm, or some kind of... appendage, shoot past my head and into the bush.

d6a9c30a-03f3-4aa1-b9e8-81ace5cabdd6.title: The Dream [D]
d6a9c30a-03f3-4aa1-b9e8-81ace5cabdd6.description: (SCENE) Dream ends and Luka wakes in bed.
d6a9c30a-03f3-4aa1-b9e8-81ace5cabdd6.speaker: Narrator

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: BEEP-BEEP-BEEP-BEEP-BEEP-BEE--
dialogueLines.formattedText: BEEP-BEEP-BEEP-BEEP-BEEP-BEE--

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: With a groan, you sit up and swing your legs out from under the covers and over the bed. It's time to get up.
dialogueLines.formattedText: With a groan, you sit up and swing your legs out from under the covers and over the bed. It's time to get up.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Class starts soon. You thankfully didn't oversleep, but you're still dead tired...
dialogueLines.formattedText: Class starts soon. You thankfully didn't oversleep, but you're still dead tired...

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: You look at your bed, still warm from your body heat. You purse your lips. Should you?
dialogueLines.formattedText: You look at your bed, still warm from your body heat. You purse your lips. Should you?

b02231c1-b27b-44a0-aa85-3cbff9e9d89f.title: Back to Bed [ENDING]
b02231c1-b27b-44a0-aa85-3cbff9e9d89f.description: Brief plot outline for this branch path...
b02231c1-b27b-44a0-aa85-3cbff9e9d89f.speaker: Narrator
